name: Texas TDLR All Licenses

agency.name: Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify on the Texas Open Data Portal before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: The dataset spans many TDLR license types and is not limited to construction or skilled-trade licenses.
Texas licensing is split across state and local authorities; this source does not represent every Texas contractor or trade authorization.
rateLimitNotes: The v0.2 adapter reads local fixture-shaped files. Any future live download support should use the official open-data export responsibly and remain opt-in.
publicRecordsNotes: Official open-data source. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The Texas Open Data Portal lists downloadable formats for the TDLR All Licenses dataset. The v0.2 adapter uses a tiny hand-authored fixture with the official column shape.
researchNotes: Fixture adapter support exists. Future local-file work should narrow trade coverage carefully because this source spans many TDLR programs.
verificationCaveats: Verification is limited to the checked local fixture-shaped file and currently does not download Texas source data.
The source spans many TDLR license programs; a match should be interpreted with license type and trade relevance preserved.
No matching record means no match in this source at the checked time and is not proof that a Texas authorization does not exist elsewhere.
verificationNotes: Fixture verification preserves source caveats and avoids presenting TDLR all-license rows as contractor-only records.
maintainerNotes: Do not treat all TDLR rows as contractor records without license-type filtering.

researchEvidence.note: Official bulk source and opt-in network path reviewed.
